summary: V8 corpus hygiene: chunk-level boilerplate clean + re-embed, upstream of dossier generation
description: Per docs/summary/document-knowledge-data-structures.md §1.2/V8 and work-grouping.md: clean chunk bodies at source (not at summary-build time) so embeddings, lexical search, runtime display, and the dossier pipeline all read clean text, and so summary_nodes.children_hash never invalidates a generated summary retroactively. Confirmed reproducer: enuma-elish chunk 001 header ('Sacred-Texts' hyphenated, no Previous/Next marker) survives all three retriever.ts regexes. Scope: in-place, chunk-id-PRESERVING strips only — whole-chunk apparatus drops and re-chunks stay with ticket 50438e23 (id-changing, needs remap machinery). Done when: corpus bodies cleaned, token_counts recomputed, embeddings rebuilt, pattern set synced to guru-web, design-doc V8 marked resolved.
